block_00:
Can we help you with your application
for Professional Trader status?
block_02: We’ve noticed that you started filling out the application to have your trading status changed, but you haven’t finished.
block_03:
Perhaps, some of the questions appeared confusing to you?
Or was it simply a bad time and wanted to get back to it later on?
block_04: Whatever the case, we’d like to offer you our help with the application.
block_06: to request a call-back for assistance or click on the button below to apply for Professional Trader status again.
